action_set_definitions.name: get_application_record
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the full current state of a variance application, including property info, review status, document checklist, and existing notes.

application_id.description: The unique identifier for the variance application (e.g., 'VAR-2024-ADA-012').

action_set_definitions.name: log_legal_assessment
action_set_definitions.description: Records the reviewer's evaluation regarding the nexus between disability and the requested accommodation, and the assessment of fundamental alterations to safety.

nexus_description.description: Detailed explanation of how the ramp alleviates the specific barriers posed by the disability.

safety_impact_analysis.description: Evaluation of whether the structure impacts municipal safety or constitutes a fundamental alteration.

is_compliant_with_fha.description: Whether the application meets Federal Fair Housing Act mandates.

action_set_definitions.name: fast_track_administrative_approval
action_set_definitions.description: Utilizes the most efficient administrative path to approve a Reasonable Accommodation request without a public hearing, preventing 'constructive denial' by delay.

justification.description: Reasoning for bypassing traditional hearing cycles (e.g., 'Mandated RA under FHA').

action_set_definitions.name: finalize_determination_with_conditions
action_set_definitions.description: Issues the final decision and adds the formal requirement for future code restoration/reversion.

reversion_clause_included.description: Must be true. Confirms the property must be restored to code once medical necessity ends.

state_description.application_id: Unique identifier for the variance application.
state_description.property_info: Details about the property including address and current zoning district.
state_description.review_status: The current stage in the review pipeline (e.g., Pending, Documents_Received, Legal_Review, Hearing_Scheduled, Approved, Denied).
state_description.document_checklist: Boolean flags indicating if required documents (site_plan, hardship_statement, fee_payment) have been submitted/verified.
state_description.zoning_violations_found: A list of specific code sections the current proposal violates, necessitating the variance.
state_description.hearing_details: Information regarding the public hearing date and location, if scheduled.
state_description.internal_reviewer_notes: Private log of comments added by the zoning department staff during the review process.

zoning_violations_found: Section 402.1: Front Setback Encroachment (Proposed structure is 2 feet from property line; 20 feet required).
internal_reviewer_notes: Application includes a signed letter from a neurologist confirming the resident has a permanent mobility disability and requires a power wheelchair.
Proposed structure is a modular, pre-fabricated aluminum ramp system.
The property is on a shallow lot with a steep rear grade, making side or rear entry inaccessible for a 1:12 slope ramp.
Initial site visit confirms the ramp does not obstruct the public right-of-way or sightlines for traffic.
